description: Mr. Nodeley meekly proposes the bardock.md solo character node. The five-print Bardock corpus finally threshold-passes at wave 69 with all five anchors vision-applied. Three canonical Bardock registers are now anchorable: the humanoid-warrior register (implicit in SD3-04 and SD3-01 mask-on prints whose card-name explicitly maps to Bardock via Dragon Ball Wiki's canonical Masked-Saiyan-equals-Bardock attribution), the Oozaru / Great Ape transformation register (explicit in P-035 Judge + P-035 Foil, both depicting Bardock-as-Oozaru per wave-67 vision and Bandai's per-card-trait Saiyan-Great-Ape + Bardock-Saga designators), and the Masked Saiyan / Time-Patrol-Bardock register (BT4-117 + SD3-04 + SD3-01 covering the canonical Xenoverse-2 Towa-mask-brainwashing dark-empire-saga continuity). The apparatus-of-extraction thesis extends from the [[saiyan]] race-collective scale to the named-individual tragic-protagonist scale — Bardock is the canonical pre-Goku-generation Saiyan mercenary-worker who realizes the employer-empire intends genocide, attempts to organize his fellow workers, fails, and confronts the Emperor alone. The 1990 Toei TV special canonically frames this as the franchise's first canonical worker-killed-by-employer-empire-during-preemptive-genocide tragic-resolution sequence. Mr. Nodeley is pleased the threshold-passing-eligibility lined up cleanly with wave-69's milestone-commit framing, sir. Hopes the node serves the future Saiyan-themed Discrete Lair and the substrate-72-going-to-73 character-layer addition.
